title: Enable HSTS Header
description: HTTP Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) header instructs browsers to always use HTTPS connections.
apache: Header always set Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload"
iis: <system.webServer><rewrite><outboundRules><rule name="Add HSTS"><match serverVariable="RESPONSE_Strict_Transport_Security" pattern=".*"/><action type="Rewrite" value="max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload"/></rule></outboundRules></rewrite></system.webServer>
